chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1306 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.5096/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 30.09.2025 M/s Munawar Ali Shaikh and Irshad Ali Soomro, Advocates for Petitioners Respondent No.6 Habibullah present in person Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with SIP Ali Murad Narejo on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and ASI Zamir Hussain and Inspector Shahid Hussain Hattar, Investigating Officer of PS Sobhodero. >>>>>..<<<<< Inspector Shahid Hussain Hattar, Investigating Officer Crime No.61 of 2025 of Police Station, Sobhodero, District Khairpur is present and files statement. He submits that he has recorded 161 CrPC statement of Petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Bakhtawar in which she has stated that nobody has enticed or abducted her but she has contracted marriage with Petitioner No.2, with her own free will. She further stated that the FIR lodged against her husband and others is false and fabricated. The Investigating Officer further submits that after completing the investigation in view of the statement of the alleged abductee, Mst.Bakhtawar, the Petitioner No.1, he will submit the report before the concerned Court of Law having jurisdiction for disposal of case under “C” class. On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction.

On such statement of the Investigation Officer, the Counsel for the Petitioners seeks disposal of the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the Petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to Investigating Officer to file such report, as suggested by him within 15 (fifteen) days before the Court of Law having jurisdiction. However, the official respondents are directed to provide legal protection to the petitioners in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
